multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle: Marvel has had a big year on the small screen, particularly this week, when it was announced that the studio had earned its first acting nomination since 2021. Marvel Studios kicked off 2026 by dropping all episodes of Wonder Man as a binge, and the show did so well that it was renewed for Season 2. This week, the Television Academy announced that leading star Yahya Abdul-Mateen II has been awarded an Emmy nomination for his performance in the show — it’s the first time a non-Guest actor earned an Awards nod since WandaVision. Marvel followed Wonder Man with the second season of Daredevil: Born Again, and we’re now almost halfway through the sophomore season of X-Men ‘97.
